headline: Trump Ends De-Minimis Exemptions To All Countries: How This Will Impact Your Online Shopping
summary: President Donald Trump's executive order, which ends de minimis exemptions, is set to take effect on Friday. This will effectively close the duty-free shipping loophole that allowed small commercial packages worth $800 or less to enter the United States without being subject to taxes or tariffs.
